title: Software Update - DFU - Perform DFU with no internet [New]
scenario: Verify DFU behavior when toggling internet connection during the update process
steps: Pair headset and launch app, then turn off WiFi.
Go to Device Settings > Software Update.
Tap the Update button and expect a 'Feature unavailable' dialog.
Turn on WiFi and tap Update again, then expect the 3-step DFU screens to appear.
Turn off WiFi and tap Continue, then expect a 'Feature unavailable' dialog.
expected: When WiFi is off, tapping Update or Continue should show a 'Feature unavailable' dialog. When WiFi is on, tapping Update should show the 3-step DFU screens.
